focus: Evidence of generative AI's positive impacts on labor markets, including productivity enhancements, job augmentation, and creation of new tasks.
title: Efficacy

focus: Documented risks and negative consequences of generative AI adoption, such as job displacement, wage polarization, and exacerbation of inequalities.
title: Safety

focus: Heterogeneous challenges of generative AI across occupations, sectors, and demographic groups, highlighting differential exposure, skill gaps, and adoption barriers.
title: Comparative

focus: Future opportunities arising from generative AI, including productivity growth, emergence of new job categories, and policy pathways to shape beneficial labor market transitions.
title: Long-term Outcomes
